title: Summary of External Public Debt Outstanding and Undisbursed as of September 22, 1959, with Service Schedule to 1973/74 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 20, page 57) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image. The image was clean and unambiguous throughout. As a cross-check, the seven debt-category amounts (130.3+12.0+223.0+49.0+9.7+56.2+28.4) were summed and confirmed to equal the printed Total Debt of 508.6. The Service Schedule block's 'Total Service' column was spot-checked against Plan Org.+Other for several years and found to match within +/-0.1 (attributable to source rounding of the underlying unrounded figures, not a transcription error). No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
time_coverage: Debt stock as of September 22, 1959 (with additions to November 30, 1959); service schedule projected 1960/1961-1973/1974
frequency: point-in-time stock (debt_summary.csv) plus annual projected debt service schedule (service_schedule.csv)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 20, page 57, source: Government of Iran, Ministry of Finance. This table has two structurally distinct parts, kept as two separate CSV files in this dataset folder rather than forced into one: (A) debt_summary.csv, a point-in-time stock of external public debt by creditor/category as of Sept 22 1959 (Total 508.6, of which $155.8 million was undisbursed per footnote 1/); (B) service_schedule.csv, a projected annual debt-service schedule from 1960/1961 through 1973/1974, split between Plan Organization and Other borrowers, per footnote 2/ EXCLUDING service on a $2.4 million unallocated portion of an Eximbank loan and a $28.6 million U.S. surplus property credit whose terms were still undetermined as of the report date. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
